name: AWS ECS Fargate Web Service
description: Deploys a containerized web application on AWS ECS Fargate, featuring an Application Load Balancer (ALB), secure listener redirection, autoscaling, and CloudWatch logging.
architectureSummary: Sets up an ECS Cluster, ECS Task Definition (Fargate), and ECS Service. Places tasks in private subnets, exposing them through an Application Load Balancer (ALB) in public subnets. Includes target group, security groups, CloudWatch Log Group for container logs, and target-tracking autoscaling (CPU & Memory).
securityNotes: Tasks run in private subnets with no direct ingress from the public internet. Access is restricted exclusively via the security group of the ALB. ECS Execution roles are granted minimal privileges required to fetch repository images and write logs. Traffic to ALB can optionally be secured via SSL/TLS certificate.

versions.changelog: Initial release with ECS cluster, task definition, Fargate service, ALB, security groups, and autoscaling.

inputs.name: project_name
inputs.label: Project Name
inputs.description: A unique name for the project, used in resource naming and tagging.

inputs.name: environment
inputs.label: Environment
inputs.description: The deployment environment (e.g., dev, staging, production).

inputs.name: aws_region
inputs.label: AWS Region
inputs.description: The AWS region to deploy the ECS service into.

inputs.name: vpc_id
inputs.label: VPC ID
inputs.description: The ID of the VPC where resources will be deployed.

inputs.name: subnet_ids
inputs.label: Private Subnet IDs
inputs.description: Comma-separated list of private subnet IDs for ECS tasks.

inputs.name: alb_subnet_ids
inputs.label: Public Subnet IDs (ALB)
inputs.description: Comma-separated list of public subnet IDs for the ALB.

inputs.name: container_image
inputs.label: Container Image
inputs.description: The Docker image to deploy (e.g., nginx:alpine or public.ecr.aws/...)

inputs.name: container_port
inputs.label: Container Port
inputs.description: The port the container listens on.

inputs.name: cpu
inputs.label: Task CPU Units
inputs.description: The number of CPU units to allocate (e.g., 256 = 0.25 vCPU, 512, 1024).

inputs.name: memory
inputs.label: Task Memory (MB)
inputs.description: The amount of memory in MB to allocate (e.g., 512, 1024, 2048).

inputs.name: desired_count
inputs.label: Desired Instance Count
inputs.description: The desired number of running container instances.

inputs.name: domain_name
inputs.label: Custom Domain Name
inputs.description: Optional custom domain name for routing traffic via Route 53 (e.g., app.example.com).

inputs.name: tags
inputs.label: Additional Tags
inputs.description: Optional comma-separated key=value pairs for additional resource tags (e.g., team=platform,cost-center=devops).

outputs.name: alb_dns_name
outputs.description: The public DNS name of the Application Load Balancer.

outputs.name: ecs_cluster_name
outputs.description: The name of the ECS cluster.

outputs.name: ecs_service_name
outputs.description: The name of the ECS service.

outputs.name: ecs_service_security_group_id
outputs.description: The ID of the security group attached to the ECS Fargate service.
